response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his current proficiency in the required low-level systems programming and navigation data infrastructure.
strengths: Built and maintained open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Recent roles focus on web/TypeScript stacks, not low-latency geospatial data pipelines
Lack of demonstrated experience with distributed systems concepts like consistency or service discovery in production
